description: Monroe Doctrine (MONROE) is an ATC-20 commemorative coin honoring America’s historic Monroe Doctrine and its enduring vision of sovereignty, strength, and hemispheric protection since 1823. Launched on AtlantisChain - the world's ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time – MONROE features instant finality, ultra-low fixed gas fees, and AI-enabled smart contracts, driving it forward with unmatched momentum and making it familiar to global Web3 users.
name: Monroe Doctrine
